2026-04-16.kind: geminicloudassist API automatically enabled for Gemini Cloud Assist chat users
2026-04-16.content:
As of April 16th, 2026, the `geminicloudassist.googleapis.com` API has been
automatically enabled on projects that meet **all** of the following criteria:

* Had used [Gemini Cloud Assist chat](https://docs.cloud.google.com/cloud-assist/chat-panel) in the prior
  60 days.
* Had the `cloudaicompanion.googleapis.com` API enabled on April 16, 2026.
* Did not have the `geminicloudassist.googleapis.com` API enabled on
  April 16, 2026.

The Gemini Cloud Assist chat functionality that was previously served by
`cloudaicompanion.googleapis.com` is now served by
`geminicloudassist.googleapis.com`, and both APIs are dependencies to use
Gemini Cloud Assist. This automatic API enablement ensures that users have
access to the same functionality without any loss of service.

summary.title: Gemini Cloud Assist API Enabled
summary.summary: The geminicloudassist.googleapis.com API is now automatically enabled for users who have recently used Gemini Cloud Assist chat and had the cloudaicompanion.googleapis.com API enabled. This ensures continued access to Gemini Cloud Assist functionality without interruption.

2026-04-10.kind: Update for Gemini Cloud Assist investigations
2026-04-10.content:
From April 10, 2026, creating, running, and editing Gemini Cloud Assist
[investigations](https://docs.cloud.google.com/cloud-assist/investigations) will only be available to users
with a Premium Support contract or who have requested access through their
account team. If you ran an investigation prior to April 10, 2026, the results
of the investigation continue to be available to you in the Google Cloud console.

summary.title: Gemini Cloud Assist Investigations Update
summary.summary: Effective April 10, 2026, access to creating, running, and editing Gemini Cloud Assist investigations will be restricted to users with Premium Support or approved access. Previously generated investigation results will remain accessible in the Google Cloud console.

summary.title: New Feature Announcement
summary.summary: We are excited to announce a new feature that will enhance your experience. This update is designed to streamline your workflow and improve overall efficiency. More details will be shared soon.

2026-04-09.content:
MCP support is available in Private Preview. To request access, contact your
Google Cloud account team. You can interact with Gemini Cloud Assist agents from
various surfaces, including third-party client agents and IDEs, using the Model
Context Protocol (MCP). For more information, see
[Integrating with MCP](https://docs.cloud.google.com/cloud-assist/docs/mcp-integration).

summary.title: Model Context Protocol Support Now in Private Preview
summary.summary: Model Context Protocol (MCP) support is now available in Private Preview, enabling interaction with Gemini Cloud Assist agents through various surfaces like third-party client agents and IDEs. Contact your Google Cloud account team to request access and explore integrating with MCP.

summary.title: New Feature Available Now
summary.summary: We are excited to announce a new feature that enhances user experience. This update brings improved functionality and performance, allowing you to accomplish tasks more efficiently. Explore the latest enhancements today!

2026-04-09.content:
Proactive agents are available in Private Preview to Premium Support customers.
Enable Gemini Cloud Assist to autonomously investigate issues triggered by Cloud
Alerting policies or cost anomalies in the background. These investigations
don't modify or make any changes to your environment. Results and insights, such
as root cause analysis for alerts or cost spike drivers, are delivered via
Eventarc. You can view these results in the Google Cloud console. This feature requires
administrator enablement and configuration of an agent identity. For more
information, see [Configure proactive agents](https://docs.cloud.google.com/cloud-assist/docs/proactive-agents-setup).

summary.title: Automated Issue Investigation with Proactive Agents
summary.summary: Gemini Cloud Assist now offers proactive agents in Private Preview for Premium Support customers. These agents autonomously investigate issues triggered by Cloud Alerting or cost anomalies without making any changes to your environment. Results, including root cause analysis, are delivered via Eventarc and viewable in the Google Cloud console.

summary.title: New Feature Available
summary.summary: We are excited to announce a new feature that will enhance your experience. This update brings improved functionality and performance to better serve your needs.

2026-04-09.content:
Page context awareness is available in Public Preview. Gemini Cloud Assist
automatically uses the context of the content currently visible on your
Google Cloud console page to provide more relevant and accurate responses to your
prompts. For more information, see
[Manage page context sharing](https://docs.cloud.google.com/cloud-assist/chat-panel#page-context-sharing)

summary.title: Page context awareness now in preview
summary.summary: Gemini Cloud Assist now offers page context awareness in Public Preview. This feature allows Gemini to understand the content on your current Google Cloud console page, providing more relevant and accurate responses to your prompts. Learn more about managing page context sharing.

summary.title: New Feature Launched
summary.summary: We are excited to announce a new feature designed to enhance your experience. This update brings improved functionality and usability, making it easier than ever to achieve your goals. Explore the new capabilities today!

2026-04-09.content:
[Enhanced agent administration controls](https://docs.cloud.google.com/cloud-assist/admin-settings) are available in Public Preview.
Administrators have the following options in the Cloud Assist settings panel:

* **Web grounding settings:** Choose how Gemini Cloud Assist uses Google Search to
  ground its responses, with options for either the most comprehensive results
  or stricter data residency compliance. For more information, see
  [Configure web grounding](https://docs.cloud.google.com/cloud-assist/docs/admin/web-grounding).
* **Custom instructions:** Define persistent system instructions to customize the
  agent's persona, response formatting, and awareness of organizational
  standards or business context for all users within the project. For more
  information, see [Set custom instructions](https://docs.cloud.google.com/cloud-assist/docs/admin/custom-instructions).

summary.title: New Agent Administration Controls Available
summary.summary: Administrators can now configure advanced settings for agent responses, including web grounding options and custom instructions for persona and context. These enhanced controls are available in Public Preview.

2026-04-08.kind: Custom IAM roles permission update for Gemini Cloud Assist
2026-04-08.content:
Gemini Cloud Assist has replaced the `cloudaicompanion.instances.completeTask`
IAM permission with `geminicloudassist.agents.invoke`. If you
have access to Gemini Cloud Assist through a custom IAM role,
you must update the role to continue having access. For more information, see the
[deprecated IAM permissions](https://docs.cloud.google.com/cloud-assist/deprecations/permissions)
document.

summary.title: Gemini Cloud Assist IAM Permission Update
summary.summary: The `cloudaicompanion.instances.completeTask` IAM permission has been replaced by `geminicloudassist.agents.invoke` for Gemini Cloud Assist. Custom IAM roles need to be updated to maintain access.

2026-04-06.kind: Custom IAM roles permission update for Gemini Cloud Assist
2026-04-06.content:
On April 8, 2026, Gemini Cloud Assist is replacing the
`cloudaicompanion.instances.completeTask` IAM permission with
`geminicloudassist.agents.invoke`. Updates to standard IAM roles
will be done automatically, but if you have access to Gemini Cloud Assist
through a custom IAM role, you must update the role before
April 8, 2026 to ensure continued access. For more information, see the
[deprecated IAM permissions](https://docs.cloud.google.com/cloud-assist/deprecations/permissions)
document.

summary.title: Gemini Cloud Assist IAM Permission Update
summary.summary: On April 8, 2026, Gemini Cloud Assist will update its IAM permissions, replacing `cloudaicompanion.instances.completeTask` with `geminicloudassist.agents.invoke`. Custom IAM roles require manual updates before this date to maintain access.

2026-01-01.content:
Gemini Cloud Assist release notes are now published here. If you are
looking for Gemini Cloud Assist release notes prior to January 2026,
see the [Gemini for Google Cloud release notes](https://docs.cloud.google.com/gemini/docs/release-notes).

summary.title: Gemini Cloud Assist Documentation Now Available
summary.summary: Gemini Cloud Assist release notes are now published in this location. For release notes prior to January 2026, please refer to the Gemini for Google Cloud release notes.
